name: Customer Journey Map Generator - AI Template
description:
A ready-to-run AI pipeline that turns customer call transcripts into a visual Customer Journey Map on Miro.

What you get:
- Two Python AI agents (transcript analyser + insights summariser)
- Sample call transcripts (PawBox pet food subscription, 6 calls)
- Pre-configured prompts for structured journey data extraction
- Step-by-step setup guide
- Works with Claude Code + Miro MCP for native board creation

The pipeline extracts stages, touchpoints, emotions, pain points, direct customer quotes, and prioritised actions from your call transcripts, then builds a professional journey map table and insights document directly on your Miro board.

Requires: Python 3.10+, Anthropic API key, Claude Code with Miro MCP.

Full write-up: https://medium.com/@milanavalerio
